title: Track and verify external reuse/improvement events
context: The project's success metrics include at least 3 externally verifiable reuse/improvement events: citations of delivered cards, merged model-card PRs upstream, or documented limitations/bias gaps acknowledged by model authors. Self-reported reuse does not count. This task searches for, records, and verifies these events against the delivered cards (card-013, card-014, scale-018) and commits a reuse-events log. Depends on card-013, card-014, and scale-018.
objective: Identify, verify, and record at least 3 externally verifiable reuse or improvement events attributable to delivered model cards from this project, with evidence links committed to the project repo.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 externally verifiable reuse or improvement events are identified and recorded: each event must be a citation of a delivered card in a paper/report, a merged model-card PR or metadata update upstream, or a documented acknowledgement of a card's limitation or bias finding by the model's author(s).

Each event record includes: the delivered card it references, the event type (citation / PR-merge / author-acknowledgement), an externally verifiable evidence link (DOI, GitHub PR URL, issue URL, or public post permalink), and the date observed.
Self-reported reuse (where the only evidence is the project's own claim) is explicitly excluded; all events are externally verifiable by a third party from the evidence link alone.
The reuse-events log is committed to the project repo and reviewed by the Steward.
The log is cross-referenced against the outcome ledger (outcomes/<model-id>.json) for the relevant models.
resources: PLAN.md — Success metrics (verified reuse/improvement signal), Outcome tracking
output: A committed reuse-events log recording at least 3 externally verifiable reuse/improvement events with evidence links, reviewed by the Steward.
